hero.label: Portfolio
hero.title: Fullstack Developer —
hero.description: I design and develop web applications end-to-end — from UI to API — prioritizing clean code, solid performance, and solutions that actually solve problems.

steps.title: Understand
steps.description: Before writing code, I dig into the real problem: who's the user, what's the context, and what are the constraints.

steps.title: Develop
steps.description: I work in short sprints with typed code, reusable components, and an architecture that scales.

steps.title: Validate
steps.description: I test with real data, check performance, and make sure edge cases are covered.

steps.title: Ship
steps.description: Automated deploys, controlled environment variables, and documentation so anyone can pick up where I left off.

cta.title: Let's build something
cta.description: Have a project in mind? I'm open to new opportunities and collaborations.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: A curated selection of projects I've worked on — filtered by role and tech stack.
projects.noResults: No projects match the selected filters.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Have a project in mind or just want to say hi? Reach out.
contact.successMessage: Message sent! I'll get back to you soon.
contact.successDetail: Here's a summary of what you sent:
